name: PER_EMPL_CONFIGURATIONS
description: This is transcational table for storing configuration of conversion to hours based on fast formula.

columns.Name: CONFIGURATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the CONFIGURATION_ID value.

columns.Name: RECORD_CREATOR
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the RECORD_CREATOR value.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CONFIGURATION_CODE
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the CONFIGURATION_CODE value.

columns.Name: CONFIGURATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the CONFIGURATION_TYPE value.

columns.Name: HOURS_IN_DAY
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the HOURS_IN_DAY value.

columns.Name: HOURS_IN_MONTH
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the HOURS_IN_MONTH value.

columns.Name: HOURS_IN_YEAR
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the HOURS_IN_YEAR value.

columns.Name: HOURS_SOURCE
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the HOURS_SOURCE value.

columns.Name: CONVERSION_FF_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the CONVERSION_FF value.

columns.Name: VERSION_CODE
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the VERSION_CODE value.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NAME
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the ATTRIBUTE_NAME value.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_VALUE
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the ATTRIBUTE_VALUE value.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ATTR1_VALUE
columns.Comments: This column has been added for use in future.

columns.Name: ATTR2_VALUE
columns.Comments: This column has been added for use in future.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER1
columns.Comments: This column has been added for use in future.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER2
columns.Comments: This column has been added for use in future.
